title: LockIn
description: The best authorization plugin. Fully customizable, optimized and functional.
body:
**LockIn | The Ultimate Auth Plugin**

The best authorization plugin. Fully customizable, optimized and functional.

**Overview**

LockIn plugin is an auth plugin that protects your **Minecraft server** from **hackers**.


**Features**

**≻** **IP based login sessions:** Players wont have to login everytime they join.

**≻** **Protects player locations:** Players are kept at the set auth location until they successfully log in.

**≻** **Hides player inventories:** Player inventories are kept hidden until they successfully log in.

**≻** **No kicks on multi-login:** Prevents players from being kicked when logged in from another location.

**≻** **Fully customizable:** You can change literally ANYTHING in the config.yml.



**Commands & Permissions**

**/register <password> -** Register with a password.

**/login <password> -** Login with your password.

**/changepass <old> <new> -** Change your current password.

**/unregister <user> -** Unregister an user's account.

**/lockin reload -** Reload the config.

**/setauthlocation -** Set the location where players are sent to log in or register.

**Permissions:** lockin.admin


**Installation**
1. Drop the LockIn.jar into your /plugins folder.
2. Restart or start the server.
3. Just make sure to set an auth location using /setauthlocation aaand your done!


**Dependencies**

None!
